subject: warp reconstructs only a region of my tomograms
body:
Dear all,

I've been reconstructing my tomogram with Warp, but when I inspect my 
tomogram with Imod it shows me only a small region out of my tomogram. 
Before i've been doing everything with warp, made stacks in IMOD and 
aligned those with AreTomo. In all those steps I can see my full tomogram. 
During reconstruction it seems like, it is reconstructing just the upper 
left corner. I tried the reconstruction several times and with different 
bins, but that didn't change the output. 
Did someone else had this issue before, or may have an idea what went wrong?

Thanks a lot
Roan
